domain_archetypes.name: cumbuca evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: cumbuca signal changes while wedge context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: wedge boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: wedge handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: proprietary regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: proprietary behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: abstractions operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: abstractions output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
